acceptance_criteria.text: Add a self-contained authenticated API smoke for Operator services apply.
proof: lint baseline checks smoke markers and rejects tests imports.

acceptance_criteria.text: Smoke creates and cleans its own fixture data.
Smoke generates saved service suggestions without external AI/provider calls.
Apply without confirm_apply is blocked and does not mutate userservices.
proof: Smoke asserts userservices are unchanged after blocked call.

acceptance_criteria.text: Apply with confirm_apply=true updates only LocalOS service fields.
proof: Live smoke returned confirmed_apply_status=completed and applied_count=2.
Smoke asserts optimized service fields were updated.

acceptance_criteria.text: Audit events record no external writes, no credit charge, and confirmation metadata.
proof: Live smoke returned blocked_audit_event=true and completed_audit_event=true.
Smoke asserts completed metadata has external_writes_performed=false, credit_charged=false, explicit_confirmation=true.

acceptance_criteria.text: Apply does not create an extra credit ledger charge.
proof: Live smoke returned ledger_after_generate=1 and ledger_after_apply=1.

acceptance_criteria.text: Lint baseline includes a self-contained smoke guardrail.
proof: scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh passed with Operator services apply smoke guardrail.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_services_optimization.py tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_manual_publish.py

cat scripts/smoke_operator_services_apply_api.py | ssh -i ~/.ssh/localos_prod -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc "cat > /tmp/smoke_operator_services_apply_api.py && PYTHONPATH=/app/src SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python3 /tmp/smoke_operator_services_apply_api.py"'
known_gaps: Authenticated browser click automation remains future UI smoke.
